data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement regarding Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or checks that directly address this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, and there is no evidence confirming the linkage of Q&A and poll responses to attendees or sessions, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of Q&A and poll response linkage to attendees/sessions.
